items.title: Final reminder: Deprecating weak cipher support!

items.title: Bug fix: Creating subitems via the API
items.excerpt:
We recently fixed a bug that prevented users from creating a subitem via the API if no subitems were ever made via the web.

items.title: Cross-region workspace templates now available!
New `docs` query argument
items.excerpt: You can now specify the documents you would like to return in a docs query using the object_ids argument. Please note that this is the same ID found in the URL and in the doc column values!

items.title: Update to the `create_subitem` mutation
items.excerpt: Please note that the item_name argument is now required for the create_subitem mutation. If you try to send the mutation without the argument, it will return an error.

items.title: Action required: Sandboxing for all iframes!
items.excerpt:
Starting Thursday, March 30th, 2023, we will implement sandboxing for all apps running in iframes (view apps)! 
These apps will be subject to additional security measures to help protect our users from XSS attacks by onl…

items.title: Update to the "users" object
items.excerpt: We recently added the non_active argument to the users object! This allows you to return all non active users on an account. Take a look at our documentation to see it in action! :sunglasses:

items.title: New "account" object field
items.excerpt: We recently added the country_code field to the account object. It will return the two-letter country code where the first account admin is located. Check out our documentation to learn more!

items.title: New "boards" object argument
items.excerpt: We recently added the workspace_ids argument to the boards object that filters boards within the specified workspace(s). Read more about the workspace_ids argument in our boards doc!
